hook.text: MCTOMINAY FIT FOR SCOTLAND'S WORLD CUP OPENER

beats.text: THE FORMER RED MISSED TRAINING WITH ILLNESS
SCOTLAND'S FIRST WORLD CUP IN 28 YEARS AWAITS
MAC IS FIT AND READY TO PLAY

caption: McTominay missed training with illness but is back fit for Scotland's World Cup opener vs Haiti — their first WC in 28 years. Once a Red, always a Red. Come on Scotland! 🏴󠁧󠁢󠁳󠁣󠁴󠁿🔴 Per Sky Sports.
